title.rationale: Canonical identifier for the research work.

authors.rationale: Essential for credit and identification of contributors.

year.rationale: Contextualizes the research within a timeline.

abstract.rationale: Provides a concise overview of the research focus and findings.

doi.rationale: Facilitates easy access and citation of the paper.

venue.rationale: Indicates the platform where the research is published.

problem_statement.description: Description of the problem being addressed
problem_statement.rationale: Clarifies the motivation behind the research.

methodology.description: Overview of the methods used in the study
methodology.rationale: Provides insights into the approach taken to solve the problem.

method_type.description: Type of method used (e.g., deep learning, retrieval-based)

architecture.rationale: Details the specific frameworks or models utilized.

data_sources.description: Datasets used for training and evaluation
data_sources.rationale: Indicates the foundation of the experiments conducted.

experiments.rationale: Shows the empirical basis for the results presented.

experiment_design.rationale: Clarifies how the experiments were structured.

evaluation_metrics.description: Metrics used to evaluate the results
evaluation_metrics.rationale: Defines how the performance of the methods was assessed.

results.description: Summary of results obtained from experiments
results.rationale: Presents the findings that support the conclusions.

performance_scores.rationale: Offers a numerical representation of the findings.

accuracy.rationale: Indicates the correctness of the predictions.

precision.rationale: Measures the relevance of the predicted outputs.

recall.rationale: Measures the model's ability to find all relevant instances.

qualitative_results.description: Examples of generated outputs or findings
qualitative_results.rationale: Provides illustrative instances of the model's performance.

discussion.description: Discussion of the results and implications
discussion.rationale: Interprets the findings and their significance.

limitations.rationale: Acknowledges potential weaknesses in the research.

reproducibility_metadata.description: Information to support reproducibility of the research
reproducibility_metadata.rationale: Ensures that other researchers can replicate the study.

code_repository.description: Link to the code repository used in the study

dataset_links.description: Links to datasets used in the research
dataset_links.rationale: Allows others to obtain the same data for validation.

environment_details.rationale: Specifies hardware and software used for experiments.
